case_title: P J CON, INC. VS. J & M HEATING COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY P J CON, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT J & M HEATING COMPANY KONG, PAUL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT J & M HEATING COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF PJ CON, INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY NEVAREZ, CO-OWNER. DEFENDANT J&M HEATING COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL KONG, OWNER. DEFENDANT PAUL KONG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS TO DISMISS THIS CASE SO THAT ALL ALLEGATIONS IN THIS CLAIM CAN BE HEARD AND ADJUDICATED IN CASE 857753. THIS MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO FURTHER ACTION TAKEN BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF P J CON, INC.
